description: MCP server for managing Coalesce Transform workspaces, nodes, pipelines, and runs.
name: io.github.Coalesce-Software-Inc/coalesce-transform

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token from the Coalesce Deploy tab. Optional when `~/.coa/config` provides a `token`.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Selects which `~/.coa/config` profile to load. Defaults to default.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Region-specific base URL. Defaults to https://app.coalescesoftware.io (US).
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Fallback org ID for cancel-run. Also readable from `orgID` in the active ~/.coa/config profile.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_ORG_ID

environmentVariables.description: Local repo root for repo-backed tools and pipeline planning. Also readable from `repoPath` in the active ~/.coa/config profile.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_REPO_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Base directory for the local data cache. When set, cache files are written here instead of the working directory. Also readable from `cacheDir` in the active ~/.coa/config profile.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: JSON size threshold before auto-caching to disk. Defaults to 32768.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_AUTO_CACHE_MAX_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Forces large responses inline as text instead of auto-caching them to disk and returning a `resource_link` (and suppresses per-field cache resource links). The server already auto-enables this for clients known not to support MCP resources (e.g. Snowflake Cortex), which otherwise render the link as unreadable "binary data" and retry in a loop. Set `true` to force it on for an unrecognised client, or `false` to disable auto-detection. Leave unset for Claude/Cursor to keep large payloads out of context. Defaults to false (auto-enabled for resource-less clients).
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_INLINE_RESPONSES

environmentVariables.description: In-memory lineage cache TTL in milliseconds. Defaults to 1800000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_LINEAGE_TTL_MS

environmentVariables.description: Max outbound API request body size. Defaults to 524288.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_MAX_REQUEST_BODY_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Default per-request timeout for Coalesce API calls. Raise on large workspaces where paginated reads exceed the default. Defaults to 60000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Per-page timeout for detail=true paginated fetches of large node lists. Defaults to 180000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_DETAIL_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: In-memory TTL for the workspace node-type inventory. Set to `0` to disable. Defaults to 300000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_INVENTORY_CACHE_TTL_MS

environmentVariables.description: In-memory TTL for the workspace node-index (id/name/type/location) cache used by SQL- and intent-ref resolution. Set to `0` to disable. Defaults to 300000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_NODE_INDEX_CACHE_TTL_MS

environmentVariables.description: In-memory TTL for the workspace node-detail (full body) cache used by review and predecessor lookups. Set to `0` to disable. Defaults to 300000.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_NODE_DETAIL_CACHE_TTL_MS

environmentVariables.description: When `true`, hides all write/mutation tools during registration. Only read, list, search, cache, analyze, review, diagnose, and plan tools are exposed. Defaults to false.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Directory for customizable AI skill resources. When set, reads context resources from this directory and seeds defaults on first run. Users can augment or override any skill.
environmentVariables.name: COALESCE_MCP_SKILLS_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake account identifier (e.g., `abc12345.us-east-1`). Required by the local `coa` CLI and `coa doctor`; not used by the MCP's REST run path. (required for run tools)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake account username (required for run tools)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Path to PEM-encoded private key (required if SNOWFLAKE_PAT not set)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_KEY_PAIR_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake Programmatic Access Token (alternative to key pair)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_PAT

environmentVariables.description: Passphrase for encrypted keys
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_KEY_PAIR_PASS

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake compute warehouse (required for run tools)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_WAREHOUSE

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake user role (required for run tools)
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_ROLE
